artPrompt: A modest, honest polling station at golden hour: a single slightly wobbling folding table draped in plain ivory cloth, an empty cardboard voting booth with a blank curtain, a tidy stack of unmarked papers, a leafy potted plant beside it. Warm low sun streams through a window onto the scene while the surrounding hall recedes into brooding shadow. No central figure. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: The Polling Place That's Actually Fair
text:
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.
Whenever the table votes, you may untap The Polling Place That's Actually Fair. (Unlike the rival's Polling Place of the Damned, this one has a ramp, clear signage, and a nonpartisan snack.)
flavorText: No funny business. No haunted booths. Just democracy and a folding table that wobbles in a politically neutral way.

extras.interaction: answer to rival's Polling Place of the Damned
